title: symphyotrichum plumosum
intro: Symphyotrichum plumosum, also known as Plumehead or False Ironweed, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum plumosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
